title: Stablecoin Firm Raises $222M, Challenging Ethereum
summary: A stablecoin company raised $222M, aiming to reduce Ethereum's dominance as institutions increasingly favor alternative crypto solutions.

title: K-Shaped Economy Driven by Inflation
summary: New research identifies inflation as a key driver of the K-shaped economy in the US, exacerbating inequality.

title: Economist Predicts Recession and Stock Market Plunge

title: China Bans AI-Driven Layoffs

title: Wall Street Bullishness Contrasts Consumer Gloom
